node src/vps/scripts/sendManualTx.js 
network chainId: 84532

Decoded RouterV1 intent:
  tokenIn: 0x1500116D88B6583E63E2Fa9D4199f2edDf72149b
  amountIn(raw): 2000000

  amountAfterFee(raw): 1980000
  deadline: 1776771608 (in 93s)

Token checks:
  token: 0x1500116D88B6583E63E2Fa9D4199f2edDf72149b (LZUSDC, decimals=6)
  wallet balance(raw): 10000000000000
  allowance to spender(raw): 200000000
ERROR: execution reverted (unknown custom error) (action="call", data="0xf6ff4fb70000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000009d28", reason=null, transaction={ "data": "", "from": "0x05F8cC8753D90d67DBB8c02118440b8283F941c9", "to": "0x6a68E37F678C4eB104372Ed4B6aC97BD0ddeF30a" }, invocation=null, revert=null, code=CALL_EXCEPTION, version=6.16.0)

---

## Root Cause (verified on-chain)

- Revert selector `0xf6ff4fb7` decodes to `NoPeer(uint32)`.
- Argument `0x9d28` is `40232` (OP Sepolia LayerZero EID).
- This means the source OFT on Base has no trusted peer configured for OP EID `40232`.

Checks performed:

```bash
# Base OFT peer for OP EID (should NOT be zero)
cast call 0x1500116D88B6583E63E2Fa9D4199f2edDf72149b "peers(uint32)(bytes32)" 40232 --rpc-url https://sepolia.base.org
# => 0x000...000

# OP OFT peer for Base EID (should NOT be zero)
cast call 0xC1d9A1f64291CF47e703eab6b27fA0660cAE7324 "peers(uint32)(bytes32)" 40245 --rpc-url https://sepolia.optimism.io
# => 0x000...000
```

Other LZ rail wiring is already present:
- LayerZero rail route config exists on both plugins.
- LayerZero receiver adapter trusted peers are configured on both chains.

## Fix

Set OFT peers bidirectionally:

```bash
# Base Sepolia: Base OFT -> OP OFT (eid 40232)
cast send 0x1500116D88B6583E63E2Fa9D4199f2edDf72149b \
  "setPeer(uint32,bytes32)" \
  40232 \
  0x000000000000000000000000C1d9A1f64291CF47e703eab6b27fA0660cAE7324 \
  --rpc-url https://sepolia.base.org \
  --private-key "$DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY"

# OP Sepolia: OP OFT -> Base OFT (eid 40245)
cast send 0xC1d9A1f64291CF47e703eab6b27fA0660cAE7324 \
  "setPeer(uint32,bytes32)" \
  40245 \
  0x0000000000000000000000001500116D88B6583E63E2Fa9D4199f2edDf72149b \
  --rpc-url https://sepolia.optimism.io \
  --private-key "$DEPLOYER_PRIVATE_KEY"
```

## Verify After Fix

```bash
cast call 0x1500116D88B6583E63E2Fa9D4199f2edDf72149b "peers(uint32)(bytes32)" 40232 --rpc-url https://sepolia.base.org
cast call 0xC1d9A1f64291CF47e703eab6b27fA0660cAE7324 "peers(uint32)(bytes32)" 40245 --rpc-url https://sepolia.optimism.io
```

Both calls should return non-zero bytes32 values matching the opposite OFT address.
